_comment: Generated in PRIORITY ORDER (Floris, 22 Jun 2026): tier 1 = characters we already need, tier 2 = wolf + story humans, tier 3 = crucial landscape, tier 4 = the big bird batch (~70% of the cast; NL is bird-dominated). Generate top-to-bottom. On Meshy ULTRA (~9,000 cr, retries FREE) the whole 76-item list fits with ~7,500 cr spare, so finish every tier incl. all birds. fox/ree/edelhert are generated on Meshy too (tier 5) for art-style cohesion — Quaternius CC0 is the free fallback only if credits run short; wolf is Meshy per Floris.

prompt: full body 3D game character of a slender 8 year old boy forest ranger, child proportions, dark ash-blond wavy messy hair with soft bangs over the forehead, large expressive blue-green eyes with long dark lashes, soft round youthful face, full rosy cheeks, small straight button nose, friendly warm smile, fair skin with a natural glow, narrow shoulders, neutral A-pose with both arms held clearly away from the body, a wide gap between arms and torso, hands open, palms facing the thighs, legs slightly apart, feet flat, head up looking ahead, green ranger jacket over a yellow shirt, khaki shorts, brown hiking boots, small ranger hat, stylized realistic, clean topology, rig ready, single character centered, plain neutral background
